params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: start_timestamp
params.description: The Unix timestamp to start retrieving analytics data from.

items.docs: Retrieves real-time analytics data for a Fastly service starting from the specified Unix timestamp. Returns a list of records, each representing one second of time, with measurement data grouped in various ways. The real-time analytics API is rate limited internally and is cached behind Fastly with a 1-second expiration time.

info.name: Get real-time analytics for the last 120 seconds

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

items.docs: Retrieves real-time analytics data for the last 120 seconds for the specified Fastly service.

info.name: Get real-time analytics with a limit

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: max_entries
params.description: The maximum number of entries to return.

items.docs: Retrieves real-time analytics data for the specified Fastly service limited to the most recent entries up to the specified maximum.

params.name: from
params.description: The start date/time for the query in ISO 8601 or Unix timestamp format.

params.name: to
params.description: The end date/time for the query in ISO 8601 or Unix timestamp format.

params.name: by
params.description: The duration of each time bucket in the response.

params.name: region
params.description: Filter results by Fastly POP region.

items.docs: Retrieves historical statistics for all Fastly services associated with the account. Data with day resolution is bucketed based on UTC days and becomes available around 2 AM the following day. Hour resolution becomes available approximately 15 minutes after the end of each hour. Minute data usually becomes available two minutes after the end of the minute. Minutely data older than 35 days and hourly data older than 375 days are not available.

info.name: Get historical stats for a service

params.description: The end date/time for the query.

params.name: by
params.description: The duration of each time bucket in the response.

params.name: region
params.description: Filter results by Fastly POP region.

items.docs: Retrieves historical statistics for a specific Fastly service over the specified time range and resolution.

items.docs: Retrieves a single historical statistics field for all services associated with the account.

params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: domain
params.description: The domain to retrieve metrics for.

params.name: max_entries

items.docs: Retrieves real-time per-domain analytics data for a specific domain on a Fastly service.

params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: origin

params.description: The maximum number of entries to return.

items.docs: Retrieves real-time per-origin analytics data for a specific origin on a Fastly service.
